case_title: WILTON MARSHALL ET AL VS. MOSTAFA KARKORI ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, WILTON MARSHALL, WILLIE MAE AS TO DEFENDANT KARKORI, MOSTAFA , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA K & L CONSTRUCTION K & L CONSTRUCTION ALI, FATIMA OUALD , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA K & L CONSTRUCTION OCCIDENTAL EXPRESS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-17-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-17-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-26-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 57324118) FILED BY DEFENDANT KARKORI, MOSTAFA OUALD, FATIMA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR ROBERT C GOODMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-28-2015 THROUGH NOV-26-2015.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-27-2015.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS.(TRANSACTION ID # 100016301)
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-17-2015. THE JUN-17-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
